HomeSection.name: Mathyu Cardozo
HomeSection.welcome: Building digital experiences that merge creativity, technology, and innovation.

AboutSection.subtitle: Get to know me
AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.paragraph1: Sr Fullstack Developer with 6 years of experience, the last 3 years working remotely for US companies with technologies such as Next.js, NestJS, Java Spring Boot, Azure and DevOps.
AboutSection.paragraph2: I specialize in developing complex solutions for telemetry in finance, retail automation, CI/CD and quality testing. Currently leading AI initiatives as Tech Lead at Entel, building speech-to-text platforms that process hundreds of thousands of daily audio calls.

ExperienceSection.subtitle: Career Path
ExperienceSection.title: Work Experience
ExperienceSection.description: 6+ years building scalable solutions across fintech, retail, telecom and AI sectors.

entel.position: Data Scientist Expert / AI Tech Lead
entel.description: Leading the development of SinfonIA, an AI-powered platform for transcribing hundreds of thousands of daily audio calls using Whisper X, generating insights to help agents improve performance.
entel.a1: Leading the AI team for SinfonIA, processing hundreds of thousands of audio files daily
entel.a2: Implemented Whisper X for high-accuracy speech-to-text transcription with silence detection
entel.a3: Developed AI-driven insights engine to analyze agent performance
entel.a4: Achieved 75% cost reduction compared to previous vendor solution
entel.a5: Architected scalable serverless infrastructure using AWS Lambda and SQS

t309.description: Startup focused on innovative technology solutions and AI-driven applications.
t309.a1: Leading the entire development team using Scrumban and Jira
t309.a2: Architecting applications with Next.js, AI integration, Java and Kotlin with Spring Boot
t309.a3: Managing cloud infrastructure on AWS and implementing ML solutions
t309.a4: Designing UI/UX with Figma while coordinating cross-functional teams
t309.a5: Establishing development standards and best practices

encora.description: Global technology company providing innovative software engineering solutions to leading enterprises.
encora.a1: Developed backend applications using Java Spring Boot with reactive programming (WebFlux, RxJava) for high-performance financial services
encora.a2: Contributed to frontend with Angular and Next.js, applied DevOps practices with SonarQube, Kiuwan and CheckStyle

serverli.description: Platform for managing and monitoring physical and IoT security systems, integrating video, access control and devices in real time.
serverli.a1: Led frontend development with Next.js and backend with Nest.js for IoT security applications
serverli.a2: Managed environments in Azure, improving system architectures
serverli.a3: Specialized in IoT security solutions integrating video surveillance and access control

mdp.description: IT services leader offering innovative solutions for clients in Latin America. Progressed through multiple roles.
mdp.a1: Backend Technical Leader: Led Pacific Client project using Java Spring Boot with Java 11/17
mdp.a2: AI Developer: Developed AI solutions using OpenAI APIs and machine learning
mdp.a3: Cloud Administrator & DevOps: Managed infrastructure automation across AWS, Azure, and GCP
mdp.a4: Scrum Master & Mentor: Led MDP bootcamp program, mentoring junior developers
mdp.a5: Tech Lead: Managed full-stack projects with Memorandum, a Greek technology company
